label: London
note: London uses official Metropolitan Police recorded-crime categories aggregated to calendar years. A few categories were renamed over time, and those official aliases are merged where the dataset clearly indicates the same series.

sources.label: MPS Recorded Crime: Geographic Breakdown dataset
ONS borough population estimates via London Datastore
ONS England and Wales local-authority population workbook
